Résumé | LinkedIn | Dribbble | Behance | GitHub | Twitter

Hi, I'm Jignesh

UI/UX Designer and frontend developer with 3+ years of experience crafting digital products for startups, agencies, and indie projects. I've led design for Chrome extensions, SaaS dashboards, fintech apps, and browser-based tools. My work has reached 10,000+ users across 12 countries.

Currently building CracklePDF — an all-in-one PDF tool for the browser. Previously designed at a product agency in Ahmedabad and freelanced for startups across India. I care deeply about accessible, well-documented design that engineers love to implement.

→ Résumé | LinkedIn | Twitter | Dribbble | Behance | GitHub

Clients / Experience

Accenture, Adobe, BookMyShow, BrowserStack, CracklePDF, DataDog, DesignStudio, Dribbble, Figma Community, Flipkart, GrowthSchool, HubSpot, IndiaMART, Jio, Lenskart, MakeMyTrip, Myntra, Notion, OYO Rooms, PayU, PhonePe, Razorpay, Shopify Partners, Swiggy, TechSparks, Unacademy, Upwork, Vistara, Webflow Partners, Zerodha

CracklePDF Chrome Extension

An all-in-one PDF tool built natively in the browser. Merge, split, compress, convert, annotate, and sign PDFs client-side — no upload, full privacy.

As solo designer and developer, I owned end-to-end product — from user research and wireframing to shipped UI and Chrome Web Store listing. Redesigned the toolbar three times based on 40+ user feedback sessions, reducing time-on-task by 31%.

Reached 3,200+ installs in its first 3 months with a 4.8-star rating. Featured on Product Hunt as #2 Product of the Day.

Disciplines

Chrome Extension UI
Icon & Brand Design
Interaction Design
Product Design
User Research
Web Development
📄Popup UI
🔀Merge
✂️Split
🏪Store

MotionRAG Studio — SaaS Dashboard

AI-powered video and motion-graphics generation platform. Designed the complete experience — from onboarding to the multi-step RAG pipeline workspace.

Designed the full product from scratch — information architecture, design system (80+ components), and interactive prototypes. Worked closely with 2 engineers across a 10-week sprint cycle.

Core design challenge: making a 7-step AI pipeline feel simple and linear. Achieved this through progressive disclosure, inline guidance, and a step-indicator component.

Disciplines

Dashboard Design
Design System (80+ components)
Figma Prototyping
Interaction Design
Product Strategy
User Research & Testing
📊Dashboard
🤖AI Pipeline
🎬Preview
📦Export

FinPay — Mobile Banking App (NDA)

Redesigned a fintech mobile banking application for Gen-Z users across India. Research-led, dark-mode-first approach that improved task completion by 28%.

Conducted 12 moderated user interviews and a card-sorting exercise with 40 participants. Synthesised findings into a new IA that removed 3 navigation layers and reduced the primary payment flow from 7 taps to 3.

Partnered with product and engineering leads to define the design system tokens, dark-mode color system, and motion guidelines — ensuring consistency across iOS and Android handoffs.

Disciplines

Accessibility (WCAG AA)
Card Sorting & IA
Dark Mode Design
Mobile Design (iOS + Android)
Usability Testing
User Research (12 interviews)
🏠Home
💳Pay
📈Analytics
🔔Alerts

Design System v2.0

Built a comprehensive design system from scratch — token-based color palette, component library with 80+ components, interaction patterns, and documentation site.

Reduced design-to-dev handoff time by 40% and eliminated a major class of inconsistency bugs. Built in Figma with auto-layout, variables, and full component documentation with usage guidelines.

Published open-source on Figma Community — 1,600+ duplicates. Adopted by 3 other teams internally within the first quarter.
